states.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

bookings.title: Consultant bookings
bookings.subtitle: Review incoming booking requests, track confirmed sessions, and monitor completed, rejected, or cancelled consultation outcomes.

note.pending: Student submitted the booking request and is waiting for your response.
note.confirmed: This booking has already been accepted and the session is confirmed.
note.completed: The consultation was delivered successfully and the booking is closed.
note.closed: This booking is closed. Rejected, expired, and cancelled requests stay visible for reference.

empty.title: No bookings in this view
empty.description: No bookings match the selected filter right now. Try another filter or return to the availability page.

details.title: Consultant request details
details.subtitle: Review the booking request, student context, and consultant decision path.

notFound.title: Booking not found
notFound.description: This booking could not be loaded. It may have been removed, or you may not have access to it.

banner.accepted: Request accepted. The student has been notified and the session is confirmed.
banner.rejected: Request rejected. The status update is now reflected for the student.
banner.cancelled: Booking cancelled. The status update is now reflected for the student.

text.pending: This consultation request is waiting for your decision.
text.confirmed: You accepted this request. The session is now confirmed and ready for consultation delivery.
text.completed: This consultation was completed successfully and the booking is now closed from the consultant side.
text.closed: This consultation request is closed. Rejected, expired, and cancelled requests remain visible for history and audit purposes.

meeting.title: Video session
meeting.note: The session is held in a built-in video room. Join from here at the scheduled time — the room opens 15 minutes before the start.

note.pending: You can now review the request and either accept or reject it.
note.confirmed: The consultation is scheduled. Join at the selected time, or mark a no-show if the student does not attend.
note.completed: The consultation session was delivered successfully and the booking moved into a completed state.
note.closed: The booking is now closed and no further consultant action is needed.

decisionHelp.title: Decision help
decisionHelp.accept: Accept when the request fits your expertise and the slot still suits your schedule — you'll need a meeting link.
decisionHelp.reject: Reject when the request cannot be handled or the selected slot is no longer suitable.
decisionHelp.noShow: Mark a no-show only when the student does not attend a confirmed session.

availability.title: Consultant availability
availability.subtitle: Manage your weekly consultation schedule and timezone from the consultant side.

banner.saved: Availability saved. Your bookable slots are now updated.

errors.noSlots: Enable at least one day before saving your availability.

weeklySchedule.title: Weekly schedule
weeklySchedule.description: Configure which days are bookable and add one or more working-hour windows per day.
weeklySchedule.invalidSlot: Each slot's start time must be before its end time.
weeklySchedule.slotOverlap: Time slots on the same day can't overlap.

bookingRules.title: Booking rules
bookingRules.description: Set the timezone your working hours are defined in.

adHoc.title: One-off slots
adHoc.description: These are your individual ad-hoc availability slots. They are kept when you save the weekly schedule.

notes.title: Availability notes
notes.line1: Enabled days define the recurring slot pool students can book on your profile page.
notes.line2: Bookable slots are expanded over the next four weeks and exclude times already taken by a booking.
